category_sources: source_facts.description says Squid is an advanced proxy caching server for HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, and Gopher; official GitHub repository describes Squid Web Proxy Cache source code and official docs are hosted on squid-cache.org.
display_name_sources: Official squid-cache.org documentation and official GitHub repository use Squid; source_facts.name is squid.
docs_sources: Official squid-cache.org Doc page is a dedicated documentation surface; official wiki says it hosts Squid Web Cache documentation; official GitHub README links the Squid site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/squid-cache/squid; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists proxy caching protocols; official GitHub topics include http, https, proxy, ftp, icap, and ecap.
